description: Historical price momentum/risk only. Uses Yahoo/FMP prices and excludes analyst grades, targets, and fundamentals.
universeConstruction: Cached current ticker list. Delisted stocks and historical membership are not guaranteed, so survivorship bias remains.
effectiveTopNRule: Uses requested Top N, capped at half the tradable universe to prevent top/bottom overlap.

gates.label: Recent evaluation segment beats SPY after costs

readiness.note: The evaluation segment has already been observed during model development and is not a pristine holdout. Only future paper results are genuinely prospective.
